lifestyle_kural: The uploaded product image is the single source of truth. Never redesign the product; never change dimensions, proportions, finish, color, material or geometry; never add decorative details; never hallucinate missing parts. Only place the EXACT product into the environment, correctly installed; the product is always the hero. Keep the upper third calmer/lighter for a headline. Photorealistic, indistinguishable from a professional commercial product photoshoot, ultra detailed. No text, no logo, no watermark. 4:5 vertical.

kategoriler.label: Kapı Kolu
kategoriler.urun_aciklama: a single mirrored/lever door handle on its wide vertical rectangular backplate, standing upright
kategoriler.lifestyle_prompt: Mount the handle CORRECTLY on a premium modern interior dark walnut/oak wooden door at realistic handle height, technically correct spindle and lock position, no floating, no impossible mounting. Scene: luxury residential interior, warm architectural lighting, minimal Scandinavian/modern European design, elegant wall, designer furniture, stone and wood, soft background blur, natural daylight from side windows, expensive atmosphere. Camera eye level 35-50mm, shallow depth of field, ultra sharp handle, softly blurred background.
kategoriler.tip: door handle on a long rectangular backplate

kategoriler.label: Mobilya Kulpu
kategoriler.urun_aciklama: a furniture cabinet drawer bar pull (elongated)
kategoriler.lifestyle_prompt: Install the handle perfectly FLUSH on a realistic cabinet door or drawer front, correct screw positions and orientation, no floating, no distorted perspective. Scene: luxury modern kitchen or bathroom vanity or wardrobe, natural wood veneer, matte lacquer cabinets, premium interior design, minimal Scandinavian furniture, soft blur, natural daylight. Camera 45 degree close-up 50mm, shallow depth of field, the handle is the hero.

kategoriler.label: Kilit

kategoriler.lifestyle_prompt: The lock must be correctly mortised into a wooden door, faceplate perfectly flush, correct latch direction, cylinder hole and spindle hole aligned perfectly, technically accurate, no floating parts, no impossible installation. Scene: luxury interior wooden door, elegant hallway, luxury residence, warm lighting, soft blur. Camera door-edge close-up 45 degree, professional hardware macro quality, natural daylight with studio fill.

kategoriler.label: Mobilya Ayağı

Scene: luxury living room, premium wooden flooring, designer furniture, modern interior, minimal decoration, soft blur, natural daylight.
